topic: My car's GPS lists Home as an address two hours away I have never lived at.
title: My GPS Says Home Is An Address I Never Lived At | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My car's GPS lists Home as an address two hours away.
scenes.image_prompt: a car dashboard navigation screen glowing in the dark, a route pin labeled far off, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have driven the same commute for nine years.
scenes.image_prompt: a quiet suburban street at dusk seen through a windshield, dim headlights, low light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I never set that address. I never lived there.
scenes.image_prompt: a finger hovering over a GPS screen showing an unfamiliar address, dark car interior, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I deleted it. The next morning it returned.
scenes.image_prompt: a navigation favorites list with one stubborn entry glowing, dim dashboard light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So one night I followed it.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark country road through a windshield, headlights cutting into fog, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It led me down roads with no streetlights at all.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty unlit rural road, tall trees pressing in, headlight beams in mist, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The address was an old farmhouse, dark and sagging.
scenes.image_prompt: a derelict farmhouse at night, broken windows, overgrown yard, fog, film grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My name was on the rusted mailbox at the gate.
scenes.image_prompt: a rusted leaning mailbox by a gravel drive, faded letters visible, dim moonlight, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A single light was on in an upstairs window.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark farmhouse with one glowing yellow upstairs window, silhouette of curtains, fog, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Through the curtains, a figure waved like it knew me.
scenes.image_prompt: a lit upstairs window with a faint human silhouette behind thin curtains, dark house, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drove home and did not get out of the car for hours.
scenes.image_prompt: a car parked in a dim driveway, person sitting still inside, faint dashboard glow, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now my real address has vanished from the GPS entirely.
scenes.image_prompt: a navigation screen with an empty home field and one distant pin remaining, dark car, fog, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
